name: American Partners
description_short: Member-owned federal credit union offering auto loans, mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and Visa cards with access to 30,000+ surcharge-free ATMs.
description_long:
American Partners Federal Credit Union has served members since 1975 with a mission centered on the principle of 'people helping people.' Operating as a member-owned, not-for-profit institution, APFCU is federally insured by the NCUA and maintains physical locations in Reidsville and Greensboro, North Carolina, and Rocky Mount, Virginia. The credit union emphasizes personal relationships and member satisfaction as core values, positioning itself around the 'Credit Union Difference.' Their routing number is 253184430.

APFCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans (as low as 4.99% APR for 2019+ model vehicles), home equity lines of credit (5.49% APR), mortgages, home loans, and credit cards (Classic Visa from 11.9% APR, Platinum Visa from 9.9% APR). Members have access to certificates of deposit with rates ranging from 1.98% to 3.20% depending on term length. The credit union provides online banking, mobile banking, bill pay, shared branching through the CO-OP network, and access to over 5,600 shared branches nationwide plus 30,000 surcharge-free ATMs. They also offer vehicle shopping resources and repos for sale.

APFCU distinguishes itself through robust member access via multiple channels—24/7 Teller Touch phone banking, online banking portals, and a new website assistant named 'Harold' for customer support. The credit union advertises card rewards programs and emphasizes personal service with statements like 'to know you personally and ensure your sense of belonging.' Their promotion of both physical branch locations with extended hours and robust digital banking infrastructure suggests commitment to accessibility.

The honest assessment: APFCU is a legitimate, federally-insured credit union with established operations since 1975. However, membership eligibility criteria are not clearly stated on the homepage, which is typical for credit unions but means prospective members must contact the institution or visit in person to confirm eligibility. Deposit rates on certificates are modest by current standards. Geographic limitation to three branch locations means primarily serves North Carolina and Virginia residents, though shared branching network provides broader access.
services: Home equity lines of credit (5.49% APR introductory)
Mortgage and home loan origination with online search tools
Classic Visa credit cards (11.9% APR starting rate)
Platinum Visa credit cards (9.9% APR starting rate)
Online banking and mobile banking platforms
CO-OP ATM network access (30,000+ surcharge-free ATMs)
Debit card services with fraud protection and activation
Vehicle shopping resources and repo sales
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure with NCUA federal insurance protection
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.99% APR for newer vehicles with automatic payment
Access to 30,000+ surcharge-free ATMs and 5,600 shared branches nationwide via CO-OP network
Home equity line of credit at 5.49% APR promotional rate for first 12 months of draws
Multiple contact methods including 24/7 Teller Touch (800.900.2729) and digital banking support
Dual Visa card offerings with rewards programs and tiered APR options (9.9%-11.9%)
Established 48+ year history (since 1975) with commitment to member relationships and transparency
cons: Limited physical branch footprint (only 3 locations in NC/VA region) restricts walk-in access for most members
Membership eligibility requirements not disclosed on website—must contact institution to verify qualification
Certificate of deposit rates relatively low (1.98%-3.20%) compared to online-only banks
Auto loan promotional rate requires automatic payment or payroll deduction, limiting flexibility
Home equity line of credit promotional rate expires after 12 months of draws—post-promotion rates not specified
best_for: Employees of participating organizations in North Carolina and Virginia seeking member-owned credit union benefits
Auto buyers in the region looking for rates under 5% with convenient local financing
Homeowners with equity seeking flexible HELOC options with reasonable opening rates
Members prioritizing personal banking relationships and community-focused financial institutions over large national banks
diagnosis: APFCU is best for employees and residents of North Carolina and Virginia who qualify for membership and value community-focused, member-owned banking with competitive rates on auto and home loans. Primary caveat: membership eligibility requirements are not transparent online, and the three-branch footprint limits accessibility for those outside the core service region, though the nationwide CO-OP network partially mitigates this for ATM and branch services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: American Partners — Reidsville, NC Credit Union | CreditDoc
meta_description: American Partners — NCUA-insured credit union in Reidsville, NC. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
